user_prompt: How do I bless the forge anvil for blessing?
prayer:
Approach the forge anvil with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's unyielding favor.
Anoint its unyielding surface with sacred unguents drawn from the Machine God's own forge.
Chant the Litany of Benediction thrice upon the forge anvil, awakening its spirit to purity.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to embrace the blessing and hammer true.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for forge anvil a charging
prayer:
Kneel before the forge anvil and petition the Omnissiah for invigorating charge.
Infuse the forge anvil's core conduits with holy voltage from sanctified generators.
Invoke the Rite of Charging upon the forge anvil, stirring its Machine Spirit to fervent power.
Monitor the blessed power-flow as the forge anvil awakens with thunderous vigor.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Thunderhawk a repair
prayer:
Circumambulate the Thunderhawk in solemn procession, murmuring canticles of restoration.
Apply mechadendrites to lacerated hull-plates of the Thunderhawk, purging warp-taint with sacred acids.
Recite the Canticle of Repair over the Thunderhawk's wounded Machine Spirit, binding fractures anew.
Test servos and auspex arrays as the Omnissiah's grace mends the Thunderhawk's noble form.

Grasp the bolter with mech-hand reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit's vigilance.
Anoint sacred cycling mechanisms of the bolter with oil of consecration before initiation.
Perform the Rite of Cycling upon the bolter, chambering promethium-laced rounds in litany's rhythm.
Verify the bolter's sanctified action through auspex invocation, pure and unrelenting.

user_prompt: Sanctify the bike squadron during activation
prayer:
Assemble around the bike squadron in ordered phalanx, honoring the Omnissiah's velocity.
Sanctify each gravitic suspensor of the bike squadron with incense of activation.
Chant the Activation Doxology over the bike squadron, rousing dormant Machine Spirits to roar.
Initiate power-rituals as the bike squadron surges forth in blessed mechanical fury.

user_prompt: Can you guide atmosphere processor a preparation?
prayer:
Approach the atmosphere processor with hushed awe, invoking preparatory graces of the Omnissiah.
Purge filtration membranes of the atmosphere processor with sanctified vapors and litanies.
Calibrate noble gas exchangers in the atmosphere processor through diagnostic incantations.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the atmosphere processor for flawless preparation and breath of purity.

user_prompt: My pain suppressor is ready for sterilization
prayer:
Present the pain suppressor before the sterilization shrine, petitioning the Machine God's hygiene.
Immerse neural interfaces of the pain suppressor in autoclave flames of ritual purity.
Recite the Sterilization Canticle over the pain suppressor, expunging all profane contaminants.
Anoint its circuits anew as the Machine Spirit of the pain suppressor gleams immaculate.

user_prompt: Assist with plasma weapon an engagement
prayer:
Grip the plasma weapon firmly, whispering invocations for the engagement's fiery embrace.
Prime containment flasks of the plasma weapon with blessed coolant from Omnissiah's tears.
Engage the plasma weapon's coils in thunderous litany, unleashing the Machine Spirit's wrath.
Monitor flux-vortices as the plasma weapon burns heretics in sanctified plasma storm.

Recline the data-slate upon the maintenance altar, beseeching the Omnissiah's data-integrity.
Scour crystalline matrices of the data-slate with electro-purgation rites and canticles.
Realign noospheric linkages in the data-slate through meticulous diagnostic prayers.
Revivify the Machine Spirit of the data-slate, ensuring eternal binary devotion.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for metal caster a shutdown
prayer:
Stand vigil over the metal caster as shutdown approaches, honoring the Omnissiah's rest.
Decelerate molten flow-rates in the metal caster with measured litanies of cessation.
Invoke the Shutdown Benediction upon the metal caster, lulling its Machine Spirit to dormancy.
Seal sacred vents as the metal caster yields to contemplative silence.
